column1:
What is this Table?
This table list the majority New York City Agencies and the unique Complaint types, complaint details and the location types present in the 311 Data on the Open Data Portal.

How you can use this table
• You can use this table to help you identify new types of complaints that are captured by 311.
---- For example, you can look at the Complaint Type Column to for the word ‘root’ or ‘tree’ and see if there are any corresponding complaint type terms for 311 requests involving trees.
---- Also, this table lets you know when you should expect a value for Complaint Description or any Additional Details. N/As mean that a certain data point is not captured in the dataset

• Use this table to get a sense of what services a Agency is responsible for.
---- Start by filtering by an Agency, from there you can see which complaint types the agency deals with. Use your findings to explore the 311 dataset easier.
